name: org.machanism.machai:bindex-maven-plugin
description:
Bindex Maven Plugin (org.machanism.machai:bindex-maven-plugin) is a Maven build plugin in the Machanism Machai ecosystem that automates generation, refresh, and registration of Bindex metadata for Maven modules. It integrates Machai/Bindex operations into the Maven build lifecycle by providing Mojos that scan the current module directory and use the effective Maven model to build a project layout (org.machanism.machai.project.layout.MavenProjectLayout) for indexing.

Core goals:
- create: generates a new Bindex index/resources for the current module during the install phase.
- update: refreshes an existing Bindex index/resources for the current module during the install phase.
- register: scans the module and publishes Bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint using org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexRegister; supports update mode.
- clean: deletes temporary Machai/Bindex artifacts under the project directory (currently .machai/bindex-inputs.txt) during the clean phase.

Behavior and configuration:
- Skips execution for aggregator/parent modules with pom packaging.
- Requires selecting a GenAI provider/model via the Maven property bindex.genai (bound to org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexCreator.MODEL_PROP_NAME; example OpenAI:gpt-5) which is used by BindexCreator and BindexRegister.
- Can optionally load GenAI credentials from Maven settings.xml by specifying gw.genai.serverId; the plugin reads the matching <server> username/password and maps them to workflow properties GENAI_USERNAME and GENAI_PASSWORD via a org.machanism.macha.core.commons.configurator.PropertiesConfigurator.
- The register goal publishes to the registry URL configured with the Maven property bindex.register.url and supports a boolean parameter update (default true) to control update vs create behavior when registering.

Intended use cases include CI/CD pipelines and local builds to enable library discovery, semantic-search-ready metadata generation, and metadata publishing to a registry for downstream assembly/integration workflows.

usageContext: Maven build lifecycle (install and clean phases)
Multi-module Maven projects (skips modules with pom packaging)
CI/CD pipelines for metadata generation and publishing
Publishing and registering semantic-search metadata for downstream assembly/integration workflows
Supplying GenAI credentials via Maven settings.xml using gw.genai.serverId

constructors.description: Base Maven Mojo for Bindex goals. Maven instantiates subclasses and injects parameters including org.apache.maven.project.MavenProject, the required GenAI model identifier (property bindex.genai), the project base directory, and org.apache.maven.settings.Settings. Provides shared helpers to skip pom-packaging modules, build a org.machanism.macha.core.commons.configurator.PropertiesConfigurator (optionally loading credentials from settings.xml using gw.genai.serverId), and create or update Bindex metadata using org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexCreator with a org.machanism.machai.project.layout.MavenProjectLayout created from the module base directory and project model.

examples.description: Illustrative instantiation of a concrete Mojo. In normal Maven execution, Maven constructs Mojos, injects @Parameter fields, and then calls execute().

constructors.description: Creates the Clean goal Mojo (normally instantiated by Maven) which deletes temporary Machai/Bindex artifacts under the project base directory; currently removes .machai/bindex-inputs.txt.

examples.description: Illustrative instantiation. Maven runs this goal in the clean phase.

constructors.description: Creates the Create goal Mojo (normally instantiated by Maven) which generates a new Bindex index/resources for the current module during the install phase, skipping modules with pom packaging.

examples.description: Illustrative instantiation. Maven executes it via the create goal.

constructors.description: Creates the Update goal Mojo (normally instantiated by Maven) which refreshes an existing Bindex index/resources for the current module during the install phase, skipping modules with pom packaging.

examples.description: Illustrative instantiation. Maven executes it via the update goal.

constructors.description: Creates the Register goal Mojo (normally instantiated by Maven) which scans the project base directory and registers/publishes Bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint during the install phase. Uses org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexRegister with the configured model and bindex.register.url and supports update mode via the update parameter (default true). Skips modules with pom packaging.

examples.description: Illustrative instantiation. Maven executes it via the register goal.

features.name: create
features.description: Maven goal that creates a new Bindex index/resources for the current module during the install phase. Skips execution for modules with pom packaging and delegates to org.machanism.machai.bindex.maven.AbstractBindexMojo.createBindex(boolean) with update=false.

examples.description: Runs the create goal to generate a fresh Bindex index for the current Maven module using the specified GenAI provider/model.

features.name: update
features.description: Maven goal that updates (refreshes) an existing Bindex index/resources for the current module during the install phase. Skips execution for modules with pom packaging and delegates to org.machanism.machai.bindex.maven.AbstractBindexMojo.createBindex(boolean) with update=true.

examples.description: Runs the update goal to refresh Bindex metadata for the current Maven module.

features.name: register
features.description: Maven goal that registers the project's Bindex metadata to an external registry endpoint. Constructs org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexRegister with the configured model (bindex.genai), registry URL (bindex.register.url), and workflow configurator (optionally with credentials from settings.xml via gw.genai.serverId). Sets update mode from the update parameter (default true) and scans the module base directory via scanFolder(java.io.File). Skips execution for modules with pom packaging; wraps java.io.IOException as MojoExecutionException.

examples.description: Scans the module and publishes Bindex metadata to a local registry endpoint using the selected GenAI provider/model.
Registers Bindex metadata without update mode.

features.name: clean
features.description: Maven goal bound to the clean phase that removes temporary Machai/Bindex artifacts by deleting the inputs log file ".machai/bindex-inputs.txt" under the project base directory.

examples.description: Deletes the Machai/Bindex inputs log file created under the .machai directory.

features.name: createBindex
features.description: Shared helper used by create/update goals to build Bindex metadata. Creates org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexCreator with the configured model and a org.machanism.macha.core.commons.configurator.PropertiesConfigurator from getConfigurator(), sets update mode, builds a org.machanism.machai.project.layout.MavenProjectLayout with projectDir(java.io.File) and model(org.apache.maven.model.Model), and processes the module folder via processFolder(org.machanism.machai.project.layout.MavenProjectLayout).

examples.snippet:
org.machanism.machai.bindex.maven.AbstractBindexMojo mojo = new org.machanism.machai.bindex.maven.Create();
// Maven normally calls execute(); createBindex(update) is invoked internally by goal implementations.
examples.description: Illustrates that create/update goals delegate to createBindex(update) to process the project folder using BindexCreator.

features.name: getConfigurator
features.description: Builds a org.machanism.macha.core.commons.configurator.PropertiesConfigurator for workflow execution. If gw.genai.serverId is set and Maven settings are available, reads the matching org.apache.maven.settings.Server entry from settings.xml and maps its username/password to workflow properties GENAI_USERNAME and GENAI_PASSWORD. Throws MojoExecutionException when settings are unavailable or the configured server id cannot be found.

examples.description: Configures GenAI credentials via Maven settings.xml and selects the server id with gw.genai.serverId.

customizations.name: bindex.genai
customizations.description: Required Maven property/parameter selecting the GenAI provider and model identifier used by the plugin when creating/updating indices and registering metadata (for example "OpenAI:gpt-5"). Bound to org.machanism.machai.bindex.BindexCreator.MODEL_PROP_NAME.

examples.description: Selects the GenAI provider/model used by the plugin.

customizations.name: bindex.register.url
customizations.description: Maven property/parameter specifying the external registry endpoint URL to which the register goal publishes metadata.

examples.description: Configures the registry endpoint for publishing Bindex metadata.

customizations.name: update
customizations.description: Boolean parameter for the register goal controlling whether registration performs an update while scanning and publishing metadata. Defaults to true.

examples.description: Runs register without update mode (depending on Maven parameter binding and plugin configuration).

customizations.name: gw.genai.serverId
customizations.description: Optional Maven property/parameter specifying a settings.xml <server> id used to read GenAI credentials. When set, the plugin reads <server><username> and <server><password> and provides them to workflows as GENAI_USERNAME and GENAI_PASSWORD.

examples.description: Selects the settings.xml server entry to supply GenAI credentials to the Bindex workflow.

examples.title: Create Bindex metadata during install
examples.notes: Generates bindex.json and related resources for the current non-pom module.

examples.title: Update Bindex metadata
examples.notes: Refreshes existing Bindex index/resources for the current non-pom module.

examples.title: Register metadata to a registry service
examples.notes: Scans the project folder and publishes metadata to the specified registry endpoint using the selected GenAI provider/model.

examples.title: Use Maven settings.xml credentials for GenAI
examples.notes: Loads GENAI_USERNAME/GENAI_PASSWORD from the settings.xml <server> entry with id my-genai.
